name_en: 🔥New🆕Medium Deer Leather Flamenco Purse Handbag 👜Celebrity Style. The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with a signature knot on the side. This medium size is made of deer leather 🥰*Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap*Detachable donut ⛓chain decorated with 💚Anagram Pebble *🧸Ultra-light, soft, and scratch-resistant, easy to match. Comes with two shoulder straps, suitable for single shoulder or crossbody. Magnetic closure*Suede lining* LOE💎WE Silver Plated 🎁
name_cn:

Size: 30cm~10.5cm~20cm
Color: Deep Red
